title: Media Asset Manager

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Media Asset Manager

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(20,20)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' rx='10' width='360' height='260' fill='#C06C88'/>
<g>
<rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='150' height='60' fill='#411C56'/>
<text x='25' y='46' fill='#FFFFFF'>Media Library</text>
</g>
<g>
<rect x='230' y='20' rx='10' width='60' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='230' y='90' rx='10' width='60' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<rect x='230' y='160' rx='10' width='60' height='60' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
</g>
<g>
<rect x='300' y='20' rx='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='300' y='90' rx='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='300' y='160' rx='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/>
</g>
<line x1='150' y1='20' x2='150' y2='260'/>
<line x1='190' y1='20' x2='190' y2='260'/>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Implement a responsive design with a navigation bar on top and a sidebar on the left.
Use only the specified colors for the UI.
The media grid should be filterable by category.
Implement a modal to display asset information, including a larger image preview and a 'Download' button.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Media Asset Manager

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filtering logic, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
